info.name: Agent1o1 API v1
info.description:
Complete API collection for Agent1o1 workflow automation platform.

## Setup
1. Set `base_url` variable (default: `http://agent1o1new.test`)
2. Run **Register** or **Login** to auto-set the `access_token`
3. Create a workspace → auto-sets `workspace_id`
4. Start using all endpoints!

## Auto-set Variables
- `access_token` — Set after Login/Register
- `workspace_id` — Set after Create Workspace
- `workflow_id` — Set after Create Workflow
- `execution_id` — Set after Execute Workflow
- `credential_id` — Set after Create Credential
- `variable_id` — Set after Create Variable
- `tag_id` — Set after Create Tag
- `webhook_id` — Set after Create Webhook
- `version_id` — Set after Create Version
- `share_id` — Set after Create Share Link
- `share_token` — Set after Create Share Link
- `sticky_note_id` — Set after Create Sticky Note
- `pinned_data_id` — Set after Pin Node Data
- `template_id` — Set after List Templates
- `log_streaming_config_id` — Set after Create Log Streaming Config

request.description: Export activity logs as JSON for compliance/audit purposes. Max 10,000 records.
Delete multiple executions at once. Max 100 IDs.
Compare two executions side-by-side, showing input/output differences per node.
Export a workflow as portable JSON format.
Import a workflow from JSON into the workspace.
List all share links for a workflow.
Create a share link for a workflow.
Update a share link.
Delete a share link.
View a shared workflow by its public token. No auth required.
Clone a shared workflow into your workspace.
List all sticky notes on a workflow canvas.
Create a sticky note on the workflow canvas.
Update a sticky note.
Delete a sticky note from the workflow canvas.
List all pinned test data for nodes in a workflow.
Pin mock/test data to a node for testing without executing upstream nodes.
Toggle whether pinned data is active (used during execution) or inactive.
Remove pinned data from a node.

Stream real-time execution events via Server-Sent Events (SSE).

Connect via EventSource in the browser:
```js
const es = new EventSource(url, { headers: { Authorization: 'Bearer token' } });
es.addEventListener('node.started', (e) => console.log(JSON.parse(e.data)));
```

Events: node.started, node.completed, node.failed, execution.completed, execution.failed, execution.cancelled
Get workspace-level settings (timezone, retention, defaults, Git sync config).
Update workspace-level settings.
Start the OAuth2 authorization flow. Returns a URL to redirect the user to the provider's consent screen.
Handle the OAuth2 callback from the provider. This is called by the provider after user grants access. Usually not called manually.
List all log streaming configurations for the workspace.
Create a log streaming configuration to forward execution events to an external destination.
Get a specific log streaming configuration.
Update a log streaming configuration.
Delete a log streaming configuration.
Get the current Git sync status — configured repo, branch, last sync timestamp, and per-workflow sync state.
Export all workspace workflows in Git-friendly format for syncing to a repository.
Browse available workflow templates. Filter by search term, category, or featured status.

exec: console.log('✅ template_id saved from first result');

request.description: Get details of a specific workflow template.
Create a new workflow in the workspace from a template.

item.name: 🔄 Job Callbacks (Internal)
item.description: Internal endpoints used by the Go execution engine. Not for direct use.
